title: Can't sleep
intro: Your body is wired when it needs to wind down. These calm the nervous system and quiet a racing mind so sleep has room to arrive.

title: Having a panic attack
intro: A panic attack feels dangerous but it will pass. These work on your body directly to bring the wave down — no thinking required.

title: Before a hard conversation
intro: Steady yourself, then say what you need clearly and kindly. Calm the body first, then use the words.

title: After an argument
intro: When the heat fades and the replay starts, these help you settle, release the resentment, and decide how to reconnect.

title: Can't make yourself start
intro: The task is sitting there and you can't begin. These break the grip of avoidance and turn intention into a first small step.

title: Spiraling in negative thoughts
intro: When the mind keeps pulling toward the worst, these help you step back from the thoughts and shift the spiral.

title: Grieving a loss
intro: There's no fixing grief, only carrying it. These offer gentle, research-based ways to hold the loss and stay connected.
